work_performed: Tower T2 west pylon cap concrete pour – 640 CY pumped. Cable stay anchorage blockout forming Level 14 east pylon. Marine crane barge repositioned to west channel. Approach span precast girder erection Span 3 – 4 girders set. 312 workers on site.

Tower T2 west pylon cap curing – heater blankets active. Cable stay duct installation Level 12-14 east pylon. Marine barge standby – rain holds precast picks PM. Drilled shaft cofferdam dewatering Pier W4. Approach deck forming Span 2 underway. 288 workers on site.
delays: Rain – afternoon precast picks suspended 2 hours

work_performed: Precast girder erection Span 3 – 4 additional girders. East pylon cable anchorage blockout concrete pour Level 13. Fender piling installation north channel – 6 piles driven. Rebar placement Pier W4 cap. 306 workers on site.

Tower T1 east pylon – slip form resumed after cure. Precast deck panels placed Span 2 grid A-D. Stay cable installation – Cable C-05 and C-06 tensioned west tower. Marine diving inspection cofferdam seal. 318 workers on site.
safety_incidents: Minor first aid – abrasion on ironworker hand. Returned to work.

work_performed: Rain hold AM – resumed 0930. Pylon slipform Level 15-16 east tower. Stay cable C-07 and C-08 installed west tower. Deck forming Span 2 – deck concrete pour Span 1 east approach 480 CY. 274 workers on site.

East pylon slipform Level 17-18. Precast girder erection Span 4 begins – 3 girders set. Approach ramp subgrade compaction West Landing. Utility conduit installation through Pier W2. 301 workers on site.

Stay cable installation C-09 and C-10 west tower. Deck concrete pour Span 2 west – 520 CY. Precast Span 4 – 4 more girders. Marine barge refueled and repositioned to east channel. 321 workers on site.
